name: CancelSubscription
description: Cancel a subscription to stop future recurring payments. The cancellation takes effect immediately - no new payments will be created. Any payments already created remain unchanged. Use this when a customer requests to stop their subscription or when ending a service. The subscription status changes to 'canceled' and cannot be reactivated. This endpoint requires the 'subscriptions.write' scope.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer who owns the subscription (e.g., 'cst_abc123').

subscription_id.description: The ID of the subscription to cancel (e.g., 'sub_abc123'). This action prevents all future payments.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to cancel a test mode subscription, or omit for live mode.
